overview: The Village of Weston Plan Commission approved the site plan for the new Mountain Bay Metropolitan Police Department and Municipal Court facility at 3600 Community Center Drive, and adopted a new salt storage shed inspection program for wellhead protection areas. Both items passed unanimously with staff conditions.

agenda.item: Call to order and roll call
Site plan review for Mountain Bay Metro Police Department and Municipal Court facility at 3600 Community Center Drive
Creation of salt storage shed inspection program for wellhead protection district
April 2026 staff approved certified survey map and site plan
Planning and development department monthly project update report
Future agenda items and staff remarks

discussions.item: Site plan review for Mountain Bay Metro Police Department and Municipal Court facility
discussions.body: The commission reviewed the site plan for the new police department and municipal court at 3600 Community Center Drive. Staff reported the project meets all B2 district zoning requirements. Chief Jeremy explained the building was rotated to address a gas pipeline easement issue, with the parking lot now over the 36-inch deep gas line, which is acceptable to the gas company. Discussion included questions about future expandability (possible to the north), landscaping meeting current code, and placement of an alternate storage shed. A motion to approve with staff conditions 2-5 passed unanimously.

discussions.item: Salt storage shed inspection program for wellhead protection district
discussions.body: Staff presented a program for two annual inspections of salt storage facilities in wellhead protection areas - one warm weather inspection focused on structural integrity and drainage, and one winter inspection focused on operations and containment. The program uses a standardized worksheet similar to DOT requirements. Discussion revealed one existing facility near the village well on Sternberg has never gone through the wellhead protection conditional use process and staff will reach out to them. A motion to approve the program with reporting back to both the Plan Commission and Public Works passed unanimously.
Motion to approve the April 13, 2026 Plan Commission meeting minutes as presented passed unanimously with no discussion.

Staff announced the first meeting of the joint Plan Commission-Village Board steering committee for the comprehensive plan is scheduled for Monday, June 1st at 5:00 p.m. Commissioner asked about potential residential TIF districts for workforce housing; staff indicated Ehlers has prepared a presentation on qualifications that could be shared with the commission or incorporated into comprehensive plan discussions.

publicComment: Jim Pensel of 5002 Arrow Street, Weston spoke via remote connection. He requested the commission urge staff to waive excessive landscaping requirements for the police department project similar to what was done for the Greenheck Turner building. He also requested annual reporting on the salt shed inspection program to ensure complaints don't get lost.
actionItems: Site plan for Mountain Bay Metro Police Department and Municipal Court facility at 3600 Community Center Drive approved with staff conditions 2-5
Salt storage shed inspection program adopted for wellhead protection district with twice-annual inspections
Staff to report back to Plan Commission and Public Works Committee on salt shed inspection findings next year
Staff to reach out to existing salt storage facility on Sternberg that has not gone through wellhead protection conditional use process
First joint Plan Commission-Village Board steering committee meeting for comprehensive plan scheduled for June 1st at 5:00 p.m.
Staff to send email and calendar invite for June 1st steering committee meeting
Electric vehicle charging station regulations to be discussed at future meeting in fall
title: Plan Commission
